data.body:
KICKOFF — Implementing epic 81e2 (relishable-outdoorsy-mare) via /rebar-implement.

WORKTREE: /Users/joeoakhart/rebar-agents-md  BRANCH: epic/agents-md-migration (from origin/main @43d154523). Commit-msg (Change-Id) hook installed; local .venv build (no unknown-key warnings). Gates ON: require_plan_review_for_claim + require_completion_verification_for_close.

LANDING METHOD: Gerrit stacked relation-chain into refs/for/main (one commit/change per code-changing story), respecting the dependency order as stack order. Push identity RebarBotNava (Contributor). This is one agent working a linear dependency chain, so a stack (not a feature branch) is the right fit.

TREE + PLAN (dependency/stack order, bottom->top):
 1. S1 073d (enormous-new-kusimanse) — Re-home CLAUDE.md content into docs/. deps: none. TRACKED docs -> Gerrit change.
 2. S2 6642 (interfaith-proud-dromedary) — canonical AGENTS.md + thin CLAUDE.md. dep: S1. -> Gerrit change.
 3. 064f (dolorous-coverable-mice) — templates/AGENTS.md + drift-guard test. dep: S1. Has real test code -> RED-first. -> Gerrit change.
 4. 46f8 (carnelian-ameboid-stinkbug) — rename examples/claude-skills->agent-skills + de-brand + update sync test. dep: S2. -> Gerrit change.
 5. 5b01 (acid-pepperish-mare) — repo-wide CLAUDE.md->AGENTS.md sweep (~17 files) + commit .codex/.agents shims. dep: S2 + 955c. -> Gerrit change (top of stack; its global git-grep=0 AC needs S1/S2/46f8 edits present).
 6. 955c (metal-fusible-unicorn) — strip CLAUDE.local.md to machine-local only. dep: S2. GIT-IGNORED file -> NO Gerrit change (local edit only).
 7. task 1d75 (eastbound-bald-raptors) — spike @AGENTS.md import: ALREADY EXECUTED (PASS, Claude Code v2.1.211). Non-code leaf; record PASS as a comment (AC wants it), close.

NOTE: this epic is docs/config-heavy; TDD held-out oracle is largely N/A. RED-first applies naturally to 064f (drift test) and 46f8 (sync-test path). Verification = each story's AC proving commands + make lint/make test green + Gerrit LLM-Review+Verified.
